ValidationRule.description: Few Container fields are mandatory for the Training Request type case.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule) , $RecordType.Name = "CONTAINER Service Engineering", ISPICKVAL(Type,"Training Request"), OR( ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Language_of_Class__c ,""), ISBLANK( CONTAINER_Lead_Instructor__c ), ISBLANK( CONTAINER_Secondary_Instructor__c ), ISBLANK( CONTAINER_Address__c ), ISBLANK( CONTAINER_City__c ), ISBLANK( CONTAINER_State_Region__c ), ISBLANK( CONTAINER_Country__c ), ISBLANK( CONTAINER_Maximum_Participants__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required fields must be completed for Training Request : Language of Class, Lead Instructor, Secondary Instructor, Address, City, State/Region, Country and Maximum Participants.
